pi_items.source: Task description lines specify 5 bookings to insert (John Smith, Maria Garcia, David Jones, Sophie Martin, Luca Rossi); verifier.py line 104 checks for exactly 5 bookings
Task description line 6 specifies '~/bookings_report.json'; setup_task.sh line 36 removes this file from /home/ga/; export_result.sh line 15 checks REPORT_FILE='/home/ga/bookings_report.json'
Task description line 8 specifies 'booking_seq starting at 1000, increment 1'; verifier.py line 114 expects refs[0] >= 1000
Task description line 9 specifies 'invoice_seq starting at 5000, increment 1'; verifier.py line 120 expects invoices[0] >= 5000
Task description explicitly requires creating vertex class 'Bookings' and edge classes 'HasBooking' and 'BookedAt'; verifier.py checks for these classes at lines 63 and 95
Task description explicitly specifies creating two ORDERED sequences named 'booking_seq' and 'invoice_seq'; verifier.py line 39 checks for both sequences

user_data.note: Email addresses (john.smith@example.com, etc.) are fictional, not real users

booking_data.note: Booking dates (2025-06-15, etc.) and prices (1250.00, etc.) are fictional

schema_origin.description: Travel Agency social platform database with real-world locations and establishments

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the official OrientDB DemoDB travel agency schema with real hotel and restaurant data from multiple countries (Hotel Artemide in Rome, Hotel Adlon Kempinski in Berlin, The Savoy in London, Hotel de Crillon in Paris, and The Plaza Hotel in New York are all verified real establishments with accurate locations and phone numbers). However, the booking data itself is synthetic: the task requires creating 5 bookings with fictional customer email addresses (john.smith@example.com, maria.garcia@example.com, david.jones@example.com, sophie.martin@example.com, luca.rossi@example.com) and dates in 2025 with artificial pricing. The task expects to create two ORDERED sequences (booking_seq starting at 1000, invoice_seq starting at 5000) and a schema with a Bookings vertex class and HasBooking/BookedAt edge classes, exporting results to /home/ga/bookings_report.json.
